name: Fat-Free Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions: Cake: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Spray a 9-inch square baking pan with cooking spray. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. In a medium bowl, whisk together egg whites, water, and corn syrup. Stir the egg mixture into the flour mixture until smooth. Pour the batter into the baking pan. Bake for 1/2 hour or until the cake springs back when lightly touched. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Glaze: Beat together cocoa, powdered sugar, vanilla, egg white, and water by droplets. Drizzle glaze over warm cake. To serve, cut into squares.
